title: Immunization of Chickens with KLH-gp120 Conjugate to Raise Anti-KLH Antibodies
author: Angel A Justiz-Vaillant
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bjvtkn6n

steps.title: Two healthy layer chickens (brown Leghorn),...
steps.instruction: Two healthy layer chickens (brown Leghorn), aged approximately 6 months, are injected intramuscularly at multiple sites on the breast with the peptide-keyhole limpet hemocyanin ( KLH) conjugate.

steps.title: The chickens are immunized on day 0, with 0
steps.instruction: The chickens are immunized on day 0, with 0.2 µmol/ml of the fragment 254-274 of HIV gp120-conjugated to KLH (immunogen) in 0.5 ml complete Freund’s adjuvant (Sigma-Aldrich Co, St. Louis Missouri).

steps.title: On days 15, 60, and 90...
steps.instruction: On days 15, 60, and 90 chickens are immunized with 0.2 µmol/ml of the immunogen in 0.5 ml incomplete Freund’s adjuvant (Sigma-Aldrich Co, St. Louis Missouri).

steps.title: The eggs are collected post-immunization
steps.instruction: The eggs are collected post-immunization.The immunoglobulin Y is separated using the Polson method (1990).

steps.title: The 96 well microtitre plate is...
steps.instruction: The 96 well microtitre plate is coated overnight at 4°C with 1 µg/µl per well of a mixture of Keyhole limpet hemocynin (KLH) in carbonate-bicarbonate buffer pH 9.6.

steps.title: Then plate is treated with bovine...
steps.instruction: Then plate is treated with bovine serum albumin solution and washed 4X with PBS-Tween.

steps.title: 50 µl of water soluble fraction...
steps.instruction: 50 µl of water soluble fraction from eggs is added and incubated for 1h at room temperature and the microplate is rewashed 4X with PBS-Tween.

steps.title: Then 50 µl of rabbit anti-chicken...
steps.instruction: Then 50 µl of rabbit anti-chicken IgY-peroxidase conjugate diluted 1:30,000 in PBS-non-fat milk is added to each well and incubated for 1h at RT. The plate is washed 4X with PBS-Tween.

steps.title: 50 µl of 4 mg/ml o-phenylenediamine...
steps.instruction: 50 µl of 4 mg/ml o-phenylenediamine solution (OPD) is added and the plate is incubated 15 minutes at RT in the dark.

steps.title: The reaction is stopped with 50...
steps.instruction: The reaction is stopped with 50 µl of 3M H2SO4 solution.

steps.title: The plate is visually assessed for...
steps.instruction: The plate is visually assessed for the development of colour and read in a microplate reader at 492 nm.

steps.title: A cut-off point should be calculated...
steps.instruction: A cut-off point should be calculated as the mean of the optical density of negative controls x 2 SD. The higher the OD value the higher will be the quantities of anti-KLH in hens.
